canonical_answer: Chopped green leafy vegetables, identified as curly kale, are spread across a dark brown wooden surface near a vertical white strip. Clear plastic bags containing similar greens sit in the upper corners, with one label reading 'UNWASHED SLICED CURLY KALE' and another showing '200g'. A hand briefly appears holding a bag while small vegetable fragments scatter on the wood.
